channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe Opens US$1.5 Million Lithium Transshipment Rail Siding To Boost Mineral Exports
item.description: Zimbabwe Opens US$1.5 Million Lithium Rail Siding To Boost Mineral Exports Zimbabwe has strengthened its mineral export infrastructure after commissioning a US$1.5 million lithium transshipment rail siding in West Nicholson, Matabeleland South. The new facility has already handle via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Double Data Bonus: Good News for Econet Customers as the Mobile Network Operator launches XtraData Bundles @econetzimbabwe
item.description: HARARE – In an era where digital connectivity has transitioned from a luxury to an absolute necessity, Zimbabwe’s largest mobile network operator, Econet Wireless, has made a decisive move to consolidate its market leadership. The company has officially pulled the curtain back on via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Premium Slot Gacor Games to Explore on Any Device
item.description: Looking for premium slot gacor games that run smoothly on your phone, tablet, or desktop without losing the features that matter? The best options are usually easy to load, simple to read on small screens, and built with clear controls that make every spin feel consistent instead via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: US$1,5m lithium rail siding boosts exports @zimsituation
item.description: Source: US$1,5m lithium rail siding boosts exports – herald Sukulwenkosi Dube-Matutu THE Second Republic has taken another major step in modernising Zimbabwe’s transport infrastructure with the commissioning of a US$1,5 million lithium transshipment rail siding in West Nicholson, via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Tax relief, low charges boost ZiG use... more individuals, companies turn to local currency @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Tax relief, low charges boost ZiG use... more individuals, companies turn to local currency – herald Debra Matabvu-Senior Reporter A COMBINATION of tax relief measures and reduced bank charges has led to increased use of the Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG) by individuals and corporat via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zimbabwe–UK air corridor reopens @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Zimbabwe–UK air corridor reopens – herald Freeman Razemba-Senior Reporter FOR the first time in more than 14 years, Air Zimbabwe will tomorrow operate a direct flight on the Harare–London route, re-establishing a direct air link between the country and one of the world’s via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Air Zimbabwe’s Harare-London route takes off Wednesday as aircraft arrives
item.description: ‘We are now reconnecting with one of our key international destinations’ The post Air Zimbabwe’s Harare-London route takes off Wednesday as aircraft arrives appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Southern Africa must confront xenophobia collectively

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Unfinished Transition: Why Stability Alone Cannot Deliver Prosperity
item.description: Economic recoveries often succeed twice. The first success is restoring stability. The second, if it comes, is restoring prosperity. The two are related, but they are not the same achievement. Inflation falls, markets begin functioning again, shops fill with goods and consumers r via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Benjani Junior Mwaruwari Joins Highlanders In Emotional Father-And-Son Reunion
item.description: Benjani Junior Mwaruwari Joins Highlanders Highlanders have confirmed the signing of winger Benjani Junior Mwaruwari, with the 21-year-old joining the Bulawayo giants after playing lower league football in the United Kingdom. The move, announced on 20 July 2026, also creates a un via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Air Zim relaunches direct Harare–London flights after 14‐year absence @bulawayo24
item.description: HARARE — Air Zimbabwe today relaunched direct flights between Harare and London, ending a 14‐year absence of a non‐stop air link between Zimbabwe and the United Kingdom and marking what officials desc... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News
